previous_bottlenecks: monolithic full-pass sync took too long and timed out without early usable output
full recursive inventory / full manifest generation in the critical path increased wall-time
heavy local trees (.venv, legacy shortform_core, runtime/setup_assets tails) dominated scan/copy cost
single long pass had weak intermediate progress signaling
fast_mode_changes: staged strategy: Stage A usable -> Stage B incremental -> Stage C heavy tail
time budgets enforced per stage to avoid silent long runs
engineering-ready state is emitted early with PUBLIC_* files
heavy-tail paths deferred by default and synced only on explicit request
